[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Suspects arrested in $1M Apple delivery truck hijacking at Americana Manhasset mall - ABC11 Raleigh-Durham
[METADATA/INTRO]: Three people were arrested Thursday in the January armed hijacking. MANHASSET, Long Island -- Three people were arrested Thursday in New York City in the January armed hijacking of a truck making a delivery at the Apple store in the...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Victims were preparing to unload the merchandise when a black Honda Accord pulled up to the delivery truck. Three masked men, armed with handguns, got out of the car and approached the victims, according to court records. 
 They forced one victim into the back of the truck and zip-tied his hands. A second victim was ordered at gunpoint, into the driver's seat to drive the truck. He was directed to a secluded parking area behind an office building less than a half mile away and then ordered into the back of the delivery truck with the first victim, where his hands were also zip-tied, according to prosecutors.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2024-11-21
[TITLE]: Chicago police share footage of Oct. 17 murder on South Side | US 99
[METADATA/INTRO]: CHICAGO (WBBM NEWSRADIO) — Chicago police are asking for the public's help in identifying two people wanted for a fatal shooting at a gas station in the Auburn Gresham neighborhood. It happened on South Morgan Street near West 87th Street...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: CHICAGO (WBBM NEWSRADIO) — Chicago police are asking for the public's help in identifying two people wanted for a fatal shooting at a gas station in the Auburn Gresham neighborhood. 
 It happened on South Morgan Street near West 87th Street at about 9 a.m. on October 17, 2024, Chicago police said. 
 A little over one month later, police have now released video from surveillance cameras. Two men are seen walking into the gas station. One is barely concealing a large gun under his left arm as he holds a cigarette. 
 They walk out and get into a black Nissan. 
 The driver then gets out and fires multiple shots at someone out of view.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2026-03-20
[TITLE]: 2 stores, minutes apart: Police search for men involved in Dollar Store robberies, retail fraud in Detroit
[METADATA/INTRO]: DETROIT – Police seek help identifying two suspects involved in a string of Dollar Store robberies and retail fraud in Detroit. On Thursday, March 12, at approximately 12:45 p.m., in the 8700 block of E. 7 Mile Road, police said...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The first suspect is 5’5”-5’7”, 140-160 pounds, wearing a black hooded sweatshirt with a white Nike logo on the front, and black pants. 
 The second suspect, the driver, is 5′3 “- 5′5”, 120-140 pounds, with a goatee/facial hair, wearing a dark beanie, a dark hooded sweatshirt, and gray pants. 
 If anyone recognizes the vehicle or information regarding the crimes, please call the Detroit Police Department’s 11th Precinct at 313-596-1140, Crime Stoppers at 1-800-Speak Up, or DetroitRewards.tv. 
 Rewards TV Link: https://detroitmi.gov/rewardstv/cases/robbery-8700-block-e-7-mile 
 All tips to Crime Stoppers are anonymous. Click here to submit a tip online.
